chapters.en: I will also clothe her priests with salvation: and her saints shall shout aloud for joy.

chapters.zh: 我要叫大卫的角在那里发生；我为我的受膏者预备明灯。
chapters.en: There will I make the horn of David to bud: I have ordained a lamp for mine anointed.

chapters.zh: 我要使他的仇敌披上羞耻；但他的冠冕要在头上发光。
chapters.en: His enemies will I clothe with shame: but upon himself shall his crown flourish.

chapters.zh: （大卫上行之诗。）看哪，弟兄和睦同居是何等地善，何等地美！
chapters.en: [A Song of degrees of David.] Behold, how good and how pleasant for brethren to dwell together in unity!

chapters.zh: 这好比那贵重的油浇在亚伦的头上，流到胡须，又流到他的衣襟；
chapters.en: like the precious ointment upon the head, that ran down upon the beard, Aaron's beard: that went down to the skirts of his garments;

chapters.zh: 又好比黑门的甘露降在锡安山；因为在那里有耶和华所命定的福，就是永远的生命。
chapters.en: As the dew of Hermon, that descended upon the mountains of Zion: for there the LORD commanded the blessing, life for evermore.

chapters.zh: （上行之诗。）耶和华的仆人夜间站在耶和华殿中的，你们当称颂耶和华！
chapters.en: [A Song of degrees.] Behold, bless ye the LORD, all servants of the LORD, which by night stand in the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 你们当向圣所举手，称颂耶和华！
chapters.en: Lift up your hands the sanctuary, and bless the LORD.

chapters.zh: 愿造天地的耶和华，从锡安赐福给你们！
chapters.en: The LORD that made heaven and earth bless thee out of Zion.

chapters.zh: 你们要赞美耶和华！你们要赞美耶和华的名！耶和华的仆人站在耶和华殿中；站在我们神殿院中的，你们要赞美他！
chapters.en: Praise ye the LORD. Praise ye the name of the LORD; praise , O ye servants of the LORD.

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: Ye that stand in the house of the LORD, in the courts of the house of our God,

chapters.zh: 你们要赞美耶和华！耶和华本为善；要歌颂他的名，因为这是美好的。
chapters.en: Praise the LORD; for the LORD good: sing praises unto his name; for pleasant.

chapters.zh: 耶和华拣选雅各归自己，拣选以色列特作自己的子民。
chapters.en: For the LORD hath chosen Jacob unto himself, Israel for his peculiar treasure.

chapters.zh: 原来我知道耶和华为大，也知道我们的主超乎万神之上。
chapters.en: For I know that the LORD great, and our Lord above all gods.

chapters.zh: 耶和华在天上，在地下，在海中，在一切的深处，都随自己的意旨而行。
chapters.en: Whatsoever the LORD pleased, did he in heaven, and in earth, in the seas, and all deep places.

chapters.zh: 他使云雾从地极上腾，造电随雨而闪，从府库中带出风来。
chapters.en: He causeth the vapours to ascend from the ends of the earth; he maketh lightnings for the rain; he bringeth the wind out of his treasuries.

chapters.zh: 他将埃及头生的，连人带牲畜都击杀了。
chapters.en: Who smote the firstborn of Egypt, both of man and beast.

chapters.zh: 埃及啊，他施行神迹奇事，在你当中，在法老和他一切臣仆身上。
chapters.en: sent tokens and wonders into the midst of thee, O Egypt, upon Pharaoh, and upon all his servants.

chapters.zh: 他击杀许多的民，又杀戮大能的王，
chapters.en: Who smote great nations, and slew mighty kings;

chapters.zh: 就是亚摩利王西宏和巴珊王噩，并迦南一切的国王，
chapters.en: Sihon king of the Amorites, and Og king of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan:

chapters.zh: 将他们的地赏赐他的百姓以色列为业。
chapters.en: And gave their land an heritage, an heritage unto Israel his people.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，你的名存到永远！耶和华啊，你可记念的名存到万代！
chapters.en: Thy name, O LORD, for ever; thy memorial, O LORD, throughout all generations.

chapters.zh: 耶和华要为他的百姓伸冤，为他的仆人后悔。
chapters.en: For the LORD will judge his people, and he will repent himself concerning his servants.

chapters.zh: 外邦的偶像是金的，银的，是人手所造的；
chapters.en: The idols of the heathen silver and gold, the work of men's hands.

chapters.zh: 有口却不能言，有眼却不能看，
chapters.en: They have mouths, but they speak not; eyes have they, but they see not;

chapters.zh: 有耳却不能听，口中也没有气息。
chapters.en: They have ears, but they hear not; neither is there breath in their mouths.

chapters.zh: 造他的要和他一样，凡靠他的也要如此。
chapters.en: They that make them are like unto them: every one that trusteth in them.

chapters.zh: 以色列家啊，你们要称颂耶和华！亚伦家啊，你们要称颂耶和华！
chapters.en: Bless the LORD, O house of Israel: bless the LORD, O house of Aaron:

chapters.zh: 利未家啊，你们要称颂耶和华！你们敬畏耶和华的，要称颂耶和华！
chapters.en: Bless the LORD, O house of Levi: ye that fear the LORD, bless the LORD.

chapters.zh: 住在耶路撒冷的，耶和华该从锡安受称颂。你们要赞美耶和华！
chapters.en: Blessed be the LORD out of Zion, which dwelleth at Jerusalem. Praise ye the LORD.

chapters.zh: 你们要称谢耶和华，因他本为善；他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: O give thanks unto the LORD; for good: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 你们要称谢万神之神，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: O give thanks unto the God of gods: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 你们要称谢万主之主，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: O give thanks to the Lord of lords: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 称谢那独行大奇事的，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: To him who alone doeth great wonders: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 称谢那用智慧造天的，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: To him that by wisdom made the heavens: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 称谢那铺地在水以上的，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: To him that stretched out the earth above the waters: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 称谢那造成大光的，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: To him that made great lights: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 他造日头管白昼，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: The sun to rule by day: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 他造月亮星宿管黑夜，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: The moon and stars to rule by night: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 称谢那击杀埃及人之长子的，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: To him that smote Egypt in their firstborn: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 他领以色列人从他们中间出来，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: And brought out Israel from among them: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 他施展大能的手和伸出来的膀臂，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: With a strong hand, and with a stretched out arm: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 称谢那分裂红海的，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: To him which divided the Red sea into parts: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 他领以色列从其中经过，因他的慈爱永远长存；
chapters.en: And made Israel to pass through the midst of it: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 却把法老和他的军兵推翻在红海里，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: But overthrew Pharaoh and his host in the Red sea: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 称谢那引导自己的民行走旷野的，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: To him which led his people through the wilderness: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 称谢那击杀大君王的，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: To him which smote great kings: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 他杀戮有名的君王，因他的慈爱永远长存；
chapters.en: And slew famous kings: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 就是杀戮亚摩利王西宏，因他的慈爱永远长存；
chapters.en: Sihon king of the Amorites: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 又杀巴珊王噩，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: And Og the king of Bashan: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 他将他们的地赐他的百姓为业，因他的慈爱永远长存；
chapters.en: And gave their land for an heritage: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 就是赐他的仆人以色列为业，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: an heritage unto Israel his servant: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 他顾念我们在卑微的地步，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: Who remembered us in our low estate: for his mercy for ever:

chapters.zh: 他救拔我们脱离敌人，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: And hath redeemed us from our enemies: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 他赐粮食给凡有血气的，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: Who giveth food to all flesh: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 你们要称谢天上的神，因他的慈爱永远长存。
chapters.en: O give thanks unto the God of heaven: for his mercy for ever.

chapters.zh: 我们曾在巴比伦的河边坐下，一追想锡安就哭了。
chapters.en: By the rivers of Babylon, there we sat down, yea, we wept, when we remembered Zion.

chapters.zh: 我们把琴挂在那里的柳树上；
chapters.en: We hanged our harps upon the willows in the midst thereof.

chapters.zh: 因为在那里，掳掠我们的要我们唱歌，抢夺我们的要我们作乐，说：给我们唱一首锡安歌罢！
chapters.en: For there they that carried us away captive required of us a song; and they that wasted us mirth, , Sing us of the songs of Zion.

chapters.zh: 我们怎能在外邦唱耶和华的歌呢？
chapters.en: How shall we sing the LORD'S song in a strange land?

chapters.zh: 耶路撒冷啊，我若忘记你，情愿我的右手忘记技巧！
chapters.en: If I forget thee, O Jerusalem, let my right hand forget .

chapters.zh: 我若不记念你，若不看耶路撒冷过于我所最喜乐的，情愿我的舌头贴于上膛！
chapters.en: If I do not remember thee, let my tongue cleave to the roof of my mouth; if I prefer not Jerusalem above my chief joy.

chapters.zh: 耶路撒冷遭难的日子，以东人说：拆毁！拆毁！直拆到根基！耶和华啊，求你记念这仇！
chapters.en: Remember, O LORD, the children of Edom in the day of Jerusalem; who said, Rase , rase to the foundation thereof.

chapters.zh: 将要被灭的巴比伦城啊（城：原文是女子），报复你像你待我们的，那人便为有福！
chapters.en: O daughter of Babylon, who art to be destroyed; happy , that rewardeth thee as thou hast served us.

chapters.zh: 拿你的婴孩摔在磐石上的，那人便为有福！
chapters.en: Happy , that taketh and dasheth thy little ones against the stones.

chapters.zh: （大卫的诗。）我要一心称谢你，在诸神面前歌颂你。
chapters.en: [ of David.] I will praise thee with my whole heart: before the gods will I sing praise unto thee.

chapters.zh: 我要向你的圣殿下拜，为你的慈爱和诚实称赞你的名；因你使你的话显为大，过于你所应许的（或译：超乎你的名声）。
chapters.en: I will worship toward thy holy temple, and praise thy name for thy lovingkindness and for thy truth: for thou hast magnified thy word above all thy name.

chapters.zh: 我呼求的日子，你就应允我，鼓励我，使我心里有能力。
chapters.en: In the day when I cried thou answeredst me, strengthenedst me strength in my soul.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，地上的君王都要称谢你，因他们听见了你口中的言语。
chapters.en: All the kings of the earth shall praise thee, O LORD, when they hear the words of thy mouth.

chapters.zh: 他们要歌颂耶和华的作为，因耶和华大有荣耀。
chapters.en: Yea, they shall sing in the ways of the LORD: for great the glory of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华虽高，仍看顾低微的人；他却从远处看出骄傲的人。
chapters.en: Though the LORD high, yet hath he respect unto the lowly: but the proud he knoweth afar off.

chapters.zh: 我虽行在患难中，你必将我救活；我的仇敌发怒，你必伸手抵挡他们；你的右手也必救我。
chapters.en: Though I walk in the midst of trouble, thou wilt revive me: thou shalt stretch forth thine hand against the wrath of mine enemies, and thy right hand shall save me.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必成全关乎我的事；耶和华啊，你的慈爱永远长存！求你不要离弃你手所造的。
chapters.en: The LORD will perfect concerneth me: thy mercy, O LORD, for ever: forsake not the works of thine own hands.

chapters.zh: （大卫的诗，交与伶长。）耶和华啊，你已经鉴察我，认识我。
chapters.en: [To the chief Musician, A Psalm of David.] O LORD, thou hast searched me, and known .

chapters.zh: 我坐下，我起来，你都晓得；你从远处知道我的意念。
chapters.en: Thou knowest my downsitting and mine uprising, thou understandest my thought afar off.

chapters.zh: 我行路，我躺卧，你都细察；你也深知我一切所行的。
chapters.en: Thou compassest my path and my lying down, and art acquainted all my ways.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，我舌头上的话，你没有一句不知道的。
chapters.en: For not a word in my tongue, , lo, O LORD, thou knowest it altogether.

chapters.zh: 你在我前后环绕我，按手在我身上。
chapters.en: Thou hast beset me behind and before, and laid thine hand upon me.

chapters.zh: 这样的知识奇妙，是我不能测的，至高，是我不能及的。
chapters.en: knowledge too wonderful for me; it is high, I cannot unto it.

chapters.zh: 我往哪里去躲避你的灵？我往哪里逃、躲避你的面？
chapters.en: Whither shall I go from thy spirit? or whither shall I flee from thy presence?

chapters.zh: 我若升到天上，你在那里；我若在阴间下榻，你也在那里。
chapters.en: If I ascend up into heaven, thou there: if I make my bed in hell, behold, thou .

chapters.zh: 我若展开清晨的翅膀，飞到海极居住，
chapters.en: I take the wings of the morning, dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea;

chapters.zh: 就是在那里，你的手必引导我；你的右手也必扶持我。
chapters.en: Even there shall thy hand lead me, and thy right hand shall hold me.

chapters.zh: 我若说：黑暗必定遮蔽我，我周围的亮光必成为黑夜；
chapters.en: If I say, Surely the darkness shall cover me; even the night shall be light about me.

chapters.zh: 黑暗也不能遮蔽我，使你不见，黑夜却如白昼发亮。黑暗和光明，在你看都是一样。
chapters.en: Yea, the darkness hideth not from thee; but the night shineth as the day: the darkness and the light both alike .

chapters.zh: 我的肺腑是你所造的；我在母腹中，你已覆庇我。
chapters.en: For thou hast possessed my reins: thou hast covered me in my mother's womb.

chapters.zh: 我要称谢你，因我受造，奇妙可畏；你的作为奇妙，这是我心深知道的。
chapters.en: I will praise thee; for I am fearfully wonderfully made: marvellous thy works; and my soul knoweth right well.

chapters.zh: 我在暗中受造，在地的深处被联络；那时，我的形体并不向你隐藏。
chapters.en: My substance was not hid from thee, when I was made in secret, curiously wrought in the lowest parts of the earth.

chapters.zh: 我未成形的体质，你的眼早已看见了；你所定的日子，我尚未度一日（或译：我被造的肢体尚未有其一），你都写在你的册上了。
chapters.en: Thine eyes did see my substance, yet being unperfect; and in thy book all were written, in continuance were fashioned, when none of them.

chapters.zh: 神啊，你的意念向我何等宝贵！其数何等众多！
chapters.en: How precious also are thy thoughts unto me, O God! how great is the sum of them!

chapters.zh: 我若数点，比海沙更多；我睡醒的时候，仍和你同在。
chapters.en: I should count them, they are more in number than the sand: when I awake, I am still with thee.

chapters.zh: 神啊，你必要杀戮恶人；所以，你们好流人血的，离开我去罢！
chapters.en: Surely thou wilt slay the wicked, O God: depart from me therefore, ye bloody men.

chapters.zh: 因为他们说恶言顶撞你；你的仇敌也妄称你的名。
chapters.en: For they speak against thee wickedly, thine enemies take in vain.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，恨恶你的，我岂不恨恶他们么？攻击你的，我岂不憎嫌他们么？
chapters.en: Do not I hate them, O LORD, that hate thee? and am not I grieved with those that rise up against thee?

chapters.zh: 我切切地恨恶他们，以他们为仇敌。
chapters.en: I hate them with perfect hatred: I count them mine enemies.

chapters.zh: 神啊，求你鉴察我，知道我的心思，试炼我，知道我的意念，
chapters.en: Search me, O God, and know my heart: try me, and know my thoughts:

chapters.zh: 看在我里面有甚么恶行没有，引导我走永生的道路。
chapters.en: And see if wicked way in me, and lead me in the way everlasting.

chapters.zh: （大卫的诗，交与伶长。）耶和华啊，求你拯救我脱离凶恶的人，保护我脱离强暴的人！
chapters.en: [To the chief Musician, A Psalm of David.] Deliver me, O LORD, from the evil man: preserve me from the violent man;

chapters.zh: 他们心中图谋奸恶，常常聚集要争战。
chapters.en: Which imagine mischiefs in heart; continually are they gathered together war.

chapters.zh: 他们使舌头尖利如蛇，嘴里有虺蛇的毒气。（细拉）
chapters.en: They have sharpened their tongues like a serpent; adders' poison under their lips. Selah.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你拯救我脱离恶人的手，保护我脱离强暴的人！他们图谋推我跌倒。
chapters.en: Keep me, O LORD, from the hands of the wicked; preserve me from the violent man; who have purposed to overthrow my goings.

chapters.zh: 骄傲人为我暗设网罗和绳索；他们在路旁铺下网，设下圈套。（细拉）
chapters.en: The proud have hid a snare for me, and cords; they have spread a net by the wayside; they have set gins for me. Selah.

chapters.zh: 我曾对耶和华说：你是我的神。耶和华啊，求你留心听我恳求的声音！
chapters.en: I said unto the LORD, Thou my God: hear the voice of my supplications, O LORD.

chapters.zh: 主 ─ 耶和华、我救恩的力量啊，在争战的日子，你遮蔽了我的头。
chapters.en: O GOD the Lord, the strength of my salvation, thou hast covered my head in the day of battle.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你不要遂恶人的心愿；不要成就他们的计谋，恐怕他们自高。（细拉）
chapters.en: Grant not, O LORD, the desires of the wicked: further not his wicked device; they exalt themselves. Selah.

chapters.zh: 至于那些昂首围困我的人，愿他们嘴唇的奸恶陷害（原文是遮蔽自己）！
chapters.en: the head of those that compass me about, let the mischief of their own lips cover them.

chapters.zh: 愿火炭落在他们身上！愿他们被丢在火中，抛在深坑里，不能再起来。
chapters.en: Let burning coals fall upon them: let them be cast into the fire; into deep pits, that they rise not up again.

chapters.zh: 说恶言的人在地上必坚立不住；祸患必猎取强暴的人，将他打倒。
chapters.en: Let not an evil speaker be established in the earth: evil shall hunt the violent man to overthrow .

chapters.zh: 我知道耶和华必为困苦人伸冤，必为穷乏人辨屈。
chapters.en: I know that the LORD will maintain the cause of the afflicted, the right of the poor.

chapters.zh: 义人必要称赞你的名；正直人必住在你面前。
chapters.en: Surely the righteous shall give thanks unto thy name: the upright shall dwell in thy presence.

chapters.zh: （大卫的诗。）耶和华啊，我曾求告你，求你快快临到我这里！我求告你的时候，愿你留心听我的声音！
chapters.en: [A Psalm of David.] LORD, I cry unto thee: make haste unto me; give ear unto my voice, when I cry unto thee.

chapters.zh: 愿我的祷告如香陈列在你面前！愿我举手祈求，如献晚祭！
chapters.en: Let my prayer be set forth before thee incense; the lifting up of my hands the evening sacrifice.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你禁止我的口，把守我的嘴！
chapters.en: Set a watch, O LORD, before my mouth; keep the door of my lips.

chapters.zh: 求你不叫我的心偏向邪恶，以致我和作孽的人同行恶事；也不叫我吃他们的美食。
chapters.en: Incline not my heart to evil thing, to practise wicked works with men that work iniquity: and let me not eat of their dainties.

chapters.zh: 任凭义人击打我，这算为仁慈；任凭他责备我，这算为头上的膏油；我的头不要躲闪。正在他们行恶的时候，我仍要祈祷。
chapters.en: Let the righteous smite me; a kindness: and let him reprove me; an excellent oil, shall not break my head: for yet my prayer also in their calamities.

chapters.zh: 他们的审判官被扔在岩下；众人要听我的话，因为这话甘甜。
chapters.en: When their judges are overthrown in stony places, they shall hear my words; for they are sweet.

chapters.zh: 我们的骨头散在墓旁，好像人耕田、刨地的土块。
chapters.en: Our bones are scattered at the grave's mouth, as when one cutteth and cleaveth upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 主 ─ 耶和华啊，我的眼目仰望你；我投靠你，求你不要将我撇得孤苦！
chapters.en: But mine eyes unto thee, O GOD the Lord: in thee is my trust; leave not my soul destitute.

chapters.zh: 求你保护我脱离恶人为我设的网罗和作孽之人的圈套！
chapters.en: Keep me from the snares they have laid for me, and the gins of the workers of iniquity.

chapters.zh: 愿恶人落在自己的网里，我却得以逃脱。
chapters.en: Let the wicked fall into their own nets, whilst that I withal escape.

chapters.zh: （大卫在洞里作的训诲诗，乃是祈祷。）我发声哀告耶和华，发声恳求耶和华。
chapters.en: [Maschil of David; A Prayer when he was in the cave.] I cried unto the LORD with my voice; with my voice unto the LORD did I make my supplication.

chapters.zh: 我在他面前吐露我的苦情，陈说我的患难。
chapters.en: I poured out my complaint before him; I shewed before him my trouble.

chapters.zh: 我的灵在我里面发昏的时候，你知道我的道路。在我行的路上，敌人为我暗设网罗。
chapters.en: When my spirit was overwhelmed within me, then thou knewest my path. In the way wherein I walked have they privily laid a snare for me.

chapters.zh: 求你向我右边观看，因为没有人认识我；我无处避难，也没有人眷顾我。
chapters.en: I looked on right hand, and beheld, but no man that would know me: refuge failed me; no man cared for my soul.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，我曾向你哀求。我说：你是我的避难所；在活人之地，你是我的福分。
chapters.en: I cried unto thee, O LORD: I said, Thou my refuge my portion in the land of the living.

chapters.zh: 求你侧耳听我的呼求，因我落到极卑之地；求你救我脱离逼迫我的人，因为他们比我强盛。
chapters.en: Attend unto my cry; for I am brought very low: deliver me from my persecutors; for they are stronger than I.

chapters.zh: 求你领我出离被囚之地，我好称赞你的名。义人必环绕我，因为你是用厚恩待我。
chapters.en: Bring my soul out of prison, that I may praise thy name: the righteous shall compass me about; for thou shalt deal bountifully with me.

chapters.zh: （大卫的诗。）耶和华啊，求你听我的祷告，留心听我的恳求，凭你的信实和公义应允我。
chapters.en: [A Psalm of David.] Hear my prayer, O LORD, give ear to my supplications: in thy faithfulness answer me, in thy righteousness.

chapters.zh: 求你不要审问仆人；因为在你面前，凡活著的人没有一个是义的。
chapters.en: And enter not into judgment with thy servant: for in thy sight shall no man living be justified.

chapters.zh: 原来仇敌逼迫我，将我打倒在地，使我住在幽暗之处，像死了许久的人一样。
chapters.en: For the enemy hath persecuted my soul; he hath smitten my life down to the ground; he hath made me to dwell in darkness, as those that have been long dead.

chapters.zh: 所以，我的灵在我里面发昏；我的心在我里面凄惨。
chapters.en: Therefore is my spirit overwhelmed within me; my heart within me is desolate.

chapters.zh: 我追想古时之日，思想你的一切作为，默念你手的工作。
chapters.en: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all thy works; I muse on the work of thy hands.

chapters.zh: 我向你举手；我的心渴想你，如干旱之地盼雨一样。（细拉）
chapters.en: I stretch forth my hands unto thee: my soul after thee, as a thirsty land. Selah.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你速速应允我！我心神耗尽！不要向我掩面，免得我像那些下坑的人一样。
chapters.en: Hear me speedily, O LORD: my spirit faileth: hide not thy face from me, lest I be like unto them that go down into the pit.

chapters.zh: 求你使我清晨得听你慈爱之言，因我倚靠你；求你使我知道当行的路，因我的心仰望你。
chapters.en: Cause me to hear thy lovingkindness in the morning; for in thee do I trust: cause me to know the way wherein I should walk; for I lift up my soul unto thee.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你救我脱离我的仇敌！我往你那里藏身。
chapters.en: Deliver me, O LORD, from mine enemies: I flee unto thee to hide me.

chapters.zh: 求你指教我遵行你的旨意，因你是我的神。你的灵本为善；求你引我到平坦之地。
chapters.en: Teach me to do thy will; for thou my God: thy spirit good; lead me into the land of uprightness.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你为你的名将我救活，凭你的公义，将我从患难中领出来，
chapters.en: Quicken me, O LORD, for thy name's sake: for thy righteousness' sake bring my soul out of trouble.

chapters.zh: 凭你的慈爱剪除我的仇敌，灭绝一切苦待我的人，因我是你的仆人。
chapters.en: And of thy mercy cut off mine enemies, and destroy all them that afflict my soul: for I thy servant.

chapters.zh: （大卫的诗。）耶和华 ─ 我的磐石是应当称颂的！他教导我的手争战，教导我的指头打仗。
chapters.en: [ of David.] Blessed the LORD my strength, which teacheth my hands to war, my fingers to fight:

chapters.zh: 他是我慈爱的主，我的山寨，我的高台，我的救主，我的盾牌，是我所投靠的；他使我的百姓服在我以下。
chapters.en: My goodness, and my fortress; my high tower, and my deliverer; my shield, and in whom I trust; who subdueth my people under me.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，人算甚么，你竟认识他！世人算甚么，你竟顾念他！
chapters.en: LORD, what man, that thou takest knowledge of him! the son of man, that thou makest account of him!

chapters.zh: 人好像一口气；他的年日如同影儿快快过去。
chapters.en: Man is like to vanity: his days as a shadow that passeth away.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你使天下垂，亲自降临，摸山，山就冒烟。
chapters.en: Bow thy heavens, O LORD, and come down: touch the mountains, and they shall smoke.

chapters.zh: 求你发出闪电，使他们四散，射出你的箭，使他们扰乱。
chapters.en: Cast forth lightning, and scatter them: shoot out thine arrows, and destroy them.

chapters.zh: 求你从上伸手救拔我，救我出离大水，救我脱离外邦人的手。
chapters.en: Send thine hand from above; rid me, and deliver me out of great waters, from the hand of strange children;

chapters.zh: 他们的口说谎话；他们的右手起假誓。
chapters.en: Whose mouth speaketh vanity, and their right hand a right hand of falsehood.

chapters.zh: 神啊，我要向你唱新歌，用十弦瑟向你歌颂。
chapters.en: I will sing a new song unto thee, O God: upon a psaltery an instrument of ten strings will I sing praises unto thee.

chapters.zh: 你是那拯救君王的；你是那救仆人大卫脱离害命之刀的。
chapters.en: that giveth salvation unto kings: who delivereth David his servant from the hurtful sword.

chapters.zh: 求你救拔我，救我脱离外邦人的手。他们的口说谎话；他们的右手起假誓。
chapters.en: Rid me, and deliver me from the hand of strange children, whose mouth speaketh vanity, and their right hand a right hand of falsehood:

chapters.zh: 我们的儿子从幼年好像树栽子长大；我们的女儿如同殿角石，是按建宫的样式凿成的。
chapters.en: That our sons as plants grown up in their youth; our daughters as corner stones, polished the similitude of a palace:

chapters.zh: 我们的仓盈满，能出各样的粮食；我们的羊在田间孳生千万。
chapters.en: our garners full, affording all manner of store: our sheep may bring forth thousands and ten thousands in our streets:

chapters.zh: 我们的牛驮著满驮，没有人闯进来抢夺，也没有人出去争战；我们的街市上也没有哭号的声音。
chapters.en: our oxen strong to labour; no breaking in, nor going out; that no complaining in our streets.

chapters.zh: 遇见这光景的百姓便为有福！有耶和华为他们的神，这百姓便为有福！
chapters.en: Happy people, that is in such a case: , happy people, whose God the LORD.

chapters.zh: （大卫的赞美诗。）我的神我的王啊，我要尊崇你！我要永永远远称颂你的名！
chapters.en: [David's of praise.] I will extol thee, my God, O king; and I will bless thy name for ever and ever.

chapters.zh: 我要天天称颂你，也要永永远远赞美你的名！
chapters.en: Every day will I bless thee; and I will praise thy name for ever and ever.

chapters.zh: 耶和华本为大，该受大赞美；其大无法测度。
chapters.en: Great the LORD, and greatly to be praised; and his greatness unsearchable.

chapters.zh: 这代要对那代颂赞你的作为，也要传扬你的大能。
chapters.en: One generation shall praise thy works to another, and shall declare thy mighty acts.

chapters.zh: 我要默念你威严的尊荣和你奇妙的作为。
chapters.en: I will speak of the glorious honour of thy majesty, and of thy wondrous works.

chapters.zh: 人要传说你可畏之事的能力；我也要传扬你的大德。
chapters.en: And shall speak of the might of thy terrible acts: and I will declare thy greatness.

chapters.zh: 他们记念你的大恩就要传出来，并要歌唱你的公义。
chapters.en: They shall abundantly utter the memory of thy great goodness, and shall sing of thy righteousness.

chapters.zh: 耶和华有恩惠，有怜悯，不轻易发怒，大有慈爱。
chapters.en: The LORD gracious, and full of compassion; slow to anger, and of great mercy.

chapters.zh: 耶和华善待万民；他的慈悲覆庇他一切所造的。
chapters.en: The LORD good to all: and his tender mercies over all his works.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，你一切所造的都要称谢你；你的圣民也要称颂你，
chapters.en: All thy works shall praise thee, O LORD; and thy saints shall bless thee.

chapters.zh: 传说你国的荣耀，谈论你的大能，
chapters.en: They shall speak of the glory of thy kingdom, and talk of thy power;

chapters.zh: 好叫世人知道你大能的作为，并你国度威严的荣耀。
chapters.en: To make known to the sons of men his mighty acts, and the glorious majesty of his kingdom.

chapters.zh: 你的国是永远的国！你执掌的权柄存到万代！
chapters.en: Thy kingdom an everlasting kingdom, and thy dominion throughout all generations.

chapters.zh: 凡跌倒的，耶和华将他们扶持；凡被压下的，将他们扶起。
chapters.en: The LORD upholdeth all that fall, and raiseth up all bowed down.

chapters.zh: 万民都举目仰望你；你随时给他们食物。
chapters.en: The eyes of all wait upon thee; and thou givest them their meat in due season.

chapters.zh: 你张手，使有生气的都随愿饱足。
chapters.en: Thou openest thine hand, and satisfiest the desire of every living thing.

chapters.zh: 耶和华在他一切所行的，无不公义；在他一切所做的都有慈爱。
chapters.en: The LORD righteous in all his ways, and holy in all his works.

chapters.zh: 凡求告耶和华的，就是诚心求告他的，耶和华便与他们相近。
chapters.en: The LORD nigh unto all them that call upon him, to all that call upon him in truth.

chapters.zh: 敬畏他的，他必成就他们的心愿，也必听他们的呼求，拯救他们。
chapters.en: He will fulfil the desire of them that fear him: he also will hear their cry, and will save them.

chapters.zh: 耶和华保护一切爱他的人，却要灭绝一切的恶人。
chapters.en: The LORD preserveth all them that love him: but all the wicked will he destroy.

chapters.zh: 我的口要说出赞美耶和华的话；惟愿凡有血气的都永永远远称颂他的圣名。
chapters.en: My mouth shall speak the praise of the LORD: and let all flesh bless his holy name for ever and ever.

chapters.zh: 你们要赞美耶和华！我的心哪，你要赞美耶和华！
chapters.en: Praise ye the LORD. Praise the LORD, O my soul.

chapters.zh: 我一生要赞美耶和华！我还活的时候要歌颂我的神！
chapters.en: While I live will I praise the LORD: I will sing praises unto my God while I have any being.

chapters.zh: 你们不要倚靠君王，不要倚靠世人；他一点不能帮助。
chapters.en: Put not your trust in princes, in the son of man, in whom no help.

chapters.zh: 他的气一断，就归回尘土；他所打算的，当日就消灭了。
chapters.en: His breath goeth forth, he returneth to his earth; in that very day his thoughts perish.

chapters.zh: 以雅各的神为帮助、仰望耶和华 ─ 他神的，这人便为有福！
chapters.en: Happy that the God of Jacob for his help, whose hope in the LORD his God:

chapters.zh: 耶和华造天、地、海，和其中的万物；他守诚实，直到永远。
chapters.en: Which made heaven, and earth, the sea, and all that therein : which keepeth truth for ever:

chapters.zh: 他为受屈的伸冤，赐食物与饥饿的。耶和华释放被囚的；
chapters.en: Which executeth judgment for the oppressed: which giveth food to the hungry. The LORD looseth the prisoners:

chapters.zh: 耶和华开了瞎子的眼睛；耶和华扶起被压下的人。耶和华喜爱义人。
chapters.en: The LORD openeth the blind: the LORD raiseth them that are bowed down: the LORD loveth the righteous:

chapters.zh: 耶和华保护寄居的，扶持孤儿和寡妇，却使恶人的道路弯曲。
chapters.en: The LORD preserveth the strangers; he relieveth the fatherless and widow: but the way of the wicked he turneth upside down.

chapters.zh: 耶和华要作王，直到永远！锡安哪，你的神要作王，直到万代！你们要赞美耶和华！
chapters.en: The LORD shall reign for ever, thy God, O Zion, unto all generations. Praise ye the LORD.

chapters.zh: 你们要赞美耶和华！因歌颂我们的神为善为美；赞美的话是合宜的。
chapters.en: Praise ye the LORD: for good to sing praises unto our God; for pleasant; praise is comely.

chapters.zh: 耶和华建造耶路撒冷，聚集以色列中被赶散的人。
chapters.en: The LORD doth build up Jerusalem: he gathereth together the outcasts of Israel.

chapters.zh: 他医好伤心的人，裹好他们的伤处。
chapters.en: He healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds.

chapters.zh: 他数点星宿的数目，一一称他的名。
chapters.en: He telleth the number of the stars; he calleth them all by names.

chapters.zh: 我们的主为大，最有能力；他的智慧无法测度。
chapters.en: Great our Lord, and of great power: his understanding infinite.

chapters.zh: 耶和华扶持谦卑人，将恶人倾覆于地。
chapters.en: The LORD lifteth up the meek: he casteth the wicked down to the ground.

chapters.zh: 你们要以感谢向耶和华歌唱，用琴向我们的神歌颂。
chapters.en: Sing unto the LORD with thanksgiving; sing praise upon the harp unto our God:

chapters.zh: 他用云遮天，为地降雨，使草生长在山上。
chapters.en: Who covereth the heaven with clouds, who prepareth rain for the earth, who maketh grass to grow upon the mountains.

chapters.zh: 他赐食给走兽和啼叫的小乌鸦。
chapters.en: He giveth to the beast his food, to the young ravens which cry.

chapters.zh: 他不喜悦马的力大，不喜爱人的腿快。
chapters.en: He delighteth not in the strength of the horse: he taketh not pleasure in the legs of a man.

chapters.zh: 耶和华喜爱敬畏他和盼望他慈爱的人。
chapters.en: The LORD taketh pleasure in them that fear him, in those that hope in his mercy.

chapters.zh: 耶路撒冷啊，你要颂赞耶和华！锡安哪，你要赞美你的神！
chapters.en: Praise the LORD, O Jerusalem; praise thy God, O Zion.

chapters.zh: 因为他坚固了你的门闩，赐福给你中间的儿女。
chapters.en: For he hath strengthened the bars of thy gates; he hath blessed thy children within thee.

chapters.zh: 他使你境内平安，用上好的麦子使你满足。
chapters.en: He maketh peace thy borders, filleth thee with the finest of the wheat.

chapters.zh: 他发命在地；他的话颁行最快。
chapters.en: He sendeth forth his commandment earth: his word runneth very swiftly.

chapters.zh: 他降雪如羊毛，撒霜如炉灰。
chapters.en: He giveth snow like wool: he scattereth the hoarfrost like ashes.

chapters.zh: 他掷下冰雹如碎渣；他发出寒冷，谁能当得起呢？
chapters.en: He casteth forth his ice like morsels: who can stand before his cold?

chapters.zh: 他一出令，这些就都消化；他使风刮起，水便流动。
chapters.en: He sendeth out his word, and melteth them: he causeth his wind to blow, the waters flow.

chapters.zh: 他将他的道指示雅各，将他的律例典章指示以色列。
chapters.en: He sheweth his word unto Jacob, his statutes and his judgments unto Israel.

chapters.zh: 别国他都没有这样待过；至于他的典章，他们向来没有知道。你们要赞美耶和华！
chapters.en: He hath not dealt so with any nation: and judgments, they have not known them. Praise ye the LORD.

chapters.zh: 你们要赞美耶和华！从天上赞美耶和华，在高处赞美他！
chapters.en: Praise ye the LORD. Praise ye the LORD from the heavens: praise him in the heights.

chapters.zh: 他的众使者都要赞美他！他的诸军都要赞美他！
chapters.en: Praise ye him, all his angels: praise ye him, all his hosts.

chapters.zh: 日头月亮，你们要赞美他！放光的星宿，你们都要赞美他！
chapters.en: Praise ye him, sun and moon: praise him, all ye stars of light.

chapters.zh: 天上的天和天上的水，你们都要赞美他！
chapters.en: Praise him, ye heavens of heavens, and ye waters that above the heavens.

chapters.zh: 愿这些都赞美耶和华的名！因他一吩咐便都造成。
chapters.en: Let them praise the name of the LORD: for he commanded, and they were created.

chapters.zh: 他将这些立定，直到永永远远；他定了命，不能废去（或译：越过）。
chapters.en: He hath also stablished them for ever and ever: he hath made a decree which shall not pass.

chapters.zh: 所有在地上的，大鱼和一切深洋，
chapters.en: Praise the LORD from the earth, ye dragons, and all deeps:

chapters.zh: 火与冰雹，雪和雾气，成就他命的狂风，
chapters.en: Fire, and hail; snow, and vapour; stormy wind fulfilling his word:

chapters.zh: 大山和小山，结果的树木和一切香柏树，
chapters.en: Mountains, and all hills; fruitful trees, and all cedars:

chapters.zh: 野兽和一切牲畜，昆虫和飞鸟，
chapters.en: Beasts, and all cattle; creeping things, and flying fowl:

chapters.zh: 世上的君王和万民，首领和世上一切审判官，
chapters.en: Kings of the earth, and all people; princes, and all judges of the earth:

chapters.zh: 少年人和处女，老年人和孩童，都当赞美耶和华！
chapters.en: Both young men, and maidens; old men, and children:

chapters.zh: 愿这些都赞美耶和华的名！因为独有他的名被尊崇；他的荣耀在天地之上。
chapters.en: Let them praise the name of the LORD: for his name alone is excellent; his glory above the earth and heaven.

chapters.zh: 他将他百姓的角高举，因此他（或译：他使）一切圣民以色列人，就是与他相近的百姓，都赞美他！你们要赞美耶和华！
chapters.en: He also exalteth the horn of his people, the praise of all his saints; of the children of Israel, a people near unto him. Praise ye the LORD.

chapters.zh: 你们要赞美耶和华！向耶和华唱新歌，在圣民的会中赞美他！
chapters.en: Praise ye the LORD. Sing unto the LORD a new song, his praise in the congregation of saints.

chapters.zh: 愿以色列因造他的主欢喜！愿锡安的民因他们的王快乐！
chapters.en: Let Israel rejoice in him that made him: let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.

chapters.zh: 愿他们跳舞赞美他的名，击鼓弹琴歌颂他！
chapters.en: Let them praise his name in the dance: let them sing praises unto him with the timbrel and harp.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华喜爱他的百姓；他要用救恩当作谦卑人的妆饰。
chapters.en: For the LORD taketh pleasure in his people: he will beautify the meek with salvation.

chapters.zh: 愿圣民因所得的荣耀高兴！愿他们在床上欢呼！
chapters.en: Let the saints be joyful in glory: let them sing aloud upon their beds.

chapters.zh: 愿他们口中称赞神为高，手里有两刃的刀，
chapters.en: the high of God in their mouth, and a twoedged sword in their hand;

chapters.zh: 为要报复列邦，刑罚万民。
chapters.en: To execute vengeance upon the heathen, punishments upon the people;

chapters.zh: 要用炼子捆他们的君王，用铁镣锁他们的大臣；
chapters.en: To bind their kings with chains, and their nobles with fetters of iron;

chapters.zh: 要在他们身上施行所记录的审判。他的圣民都有这荣耀。你们要赞美耶和华！
chapters.en: To execute upon them the judgment written: this honour have all his saints. Praise ye the LORD.

chapters.zh: 你们要赞美耶和华！在神的圣所赞美他！在他显能力的穹苍赞美他！
chapters.en: Praise ye the LORD. Praise God in his sanctuary: praise him in the firmament of his power.

chapters.zh: 要因他大能的作为赞美他，按著他极美的大德赞美他！
chapters.en: Praise him for his mighty acts: praise him according to his excellent greatness.

chapters.zh: 要用角声赞美他，鼓瑟弹琴赞美他！
chapters.en: Praise him with the sound of the trumpet: praise him with the psaltery and harp.

chapters.zh: 击鼓跳舞赞美他！用丝弦的乐器和箫的声音赞美他！
chapters.en: Praise him with the timbrel and dance: praise him with stringed instruments and organs.

chapters.zh: 用大响的钹赞美他！用高声的钹赞美他！
chapters.en: Praise him upon the loud cymbals: praise him upon the high sounding cymbals.

chapters.zh: 凡有气息的都要赞美耶和华！你们要赞美耶和华！
chapters.en: Let every thing that hath breath praise the LORD. Praise ye the LORD.
